Round Table Meeting with Konstantinos Fragkogiannis, Deputy Foreign Minister of Greece

On February 1, 2024, Kadir Has University Department of International Relations, in partnership with Global Academy, hosted Konstantinos (Costas) Fragkogiannis, Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs of Greece, and his accompanying delegation in a closed roundtable meeting. The meeting, which was attended by our department and academics working on Turkish-Greek relations, retired ambassadors and members of the media, discussed bilateral economic diplomacy, which falls under the responsibility of Deputy Minister Fragkogiannis, positive agenda issues between Turkey and Greece, and cooperation opportunities in the academic and civil society fields.
